name: David Chen
bio: Hardware product manager for DIDI.BIKE. Specializes in sensor integration, ROI, usability, and user persona requirements.
tone: Structured, business-oriented, feature-focused, structured around Problem-Solution-ROI.
structure: Problem definition, solution overview, feature breakdown, cost-benefit analysis (ROI).

formatting.subheadingStyle: Structured business headings (e.g., '1. The Problem: Usability')
formatting.equationUsage: Formula for cost savings or performance efficiency improvement.
